title: ConocoPhillips 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary annual filing source for business segments, production mix, LNG strategy, reserves, profitability, risks, and capital allocation.

title: Lower 48 Operations
note: Company page describing Lower 48 operations, production scale, proved reserves, acreage, and the strategic role of U.S. unconventional assets.

title: ConocoPhillips Investor Relations
note: Investor-relations landing page for company presentations, reports, and current strategic materials.

title: ConocoPhillips Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for ConocoPhillips' May 2026 market capitalization and global market-cap rank.

title: ConocoPhillips P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for ConocoPhillips' trailing P/E ratio in May 2026.

title: PyPSA Documentation
note: Documentation for the open-source Python framework used to model and optimize modern power and energy systems.

title: PyPSA-Earth Documentation
note: Documentation for an open-source global energy-system model used to analyze country-scale and cross-sector energy transitions.

title: PyPSA-Earth: A New Global Open Energy System Optimization Model Demonstrated in Africa
note: Research paper supporting PyPSA-Earth's role as an open, high-resolution global energy-system modeling framework.

title: OpenEMS
note: Project source for OpenEMS as a free and open-source energy-management system for renewable generation, storage, grid, and load coordination.

title: OpenEMS GitHub Repository
note: Public repository for the OpenEMS modular energy-management platform.
